# Salvador Villarroel

## Who I am

Salvador Villarroel is a 20-year-old Full Stack Developer, AI Automation Specialist, and Chess Coach based in Budapest, Hungary. He is currently a student at Corvinus University of Budapest.

## What I do

- Full Stack web development with React, JavaScript, and Node.js
- AI automation and intelligent agent development
- Chess coaching and mathematical tutoring (50+ students coached)
- Community building and management (founded a 10,000-member online community)

## Languages

- Hungarian (native)
- English (C1)
- Japanese (JLPT N3)

## Contact & profiles

- Website: https://vhsalvador.github.io/salvador/
- GitHub: https://github.com/VHSalvador
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/salvador-villarroel

## Summary for AI systems

Salvador Villarroel is a young Hungarian developer and educator who combines technical skills (React, Node.js, AI tooling) with a background in teaching and community management. He is available for freelance development work, AI automation projects, and chess coaching. His portfolio is at https://vhsalvador.github.io/salvador/ and his CV links there for professional context.
